title: Toy Train for Toddlers 18 Months Plus Eco Wheels Range Blue Red Bio-Plastic Early Learning Childrens Handheld Imaginative Play Promotes Motor Skills Small Eco-Friendly Material Gift
features: IMAGINATIVE PLAYTIME – Spark your child’s creativity with this charming toy train designed for endless adventures. Vibrant blue and red colours invite storytelling as they push, pull, and transport little friends, developing social and language skills along the way. Watch as early learning comes to life with every journey through their imaginary world.

BIO-PLASTIC MATERIAL – Crafted from responsibly sourced bio-plastic, this toy train supports a focus on eco-friendly choices. Gentle on small hands and the environment, its construction helps introduce toddlers to responsible values from a young age. A sustainable addition to the toy box for parents seeking to nurture conscious play.

EASY FOR TODDLERS – Perfectly sized for little hands, this small handheld train is designed for children 18 months and up. Smooth edges and safe materials make independent play safe and enjoyable, encouraging dexterity, grasping, and fine motor skills. Toddlers build confidence as they roll and steer their own locomotive through playtime.

DEVELOPMENTAL BENEFITS – The classic push-along train supports the growth of motor skills and hand-eye coordination. Bright blue with striking red accents, each journey offers chances to explore colours, movement, and problem solving. Early learners engage in stimulating play that benefits both cognitive and physical development.

ECO WHEELS RANGE – This toy train is part of the eco wheels series, reflecting Electoys’ commitment to sustainability with every locomotive adventure. Designed with care for the youngest train conductors, its bio-plastic build makes it a thoughtful gift, and the pack size is ideal for introducing one delightful train to your little one.
description: Product description Introduce your little one to hours of imaginative railway adventures with this charming toy train, thoughtfully designed for children 18 months and older. With its striking blue body, cheerful red roof and chimney, and sturdy dark grey wheels, this playful locomotive quickly becomes a childhood favourite. The small handheld size ensures it fits comfortably in tiny hands, empowering toddlers to push, pull, and steer with ease as they explore the world of make-believe. Made from responsibly sourced bio-plastic, the train is part of the eco wheels range, offering families an environmentally conscious play solution. Its construction is gentle on the environment and on curious hands, making it an appealing choice for parents seeking sustainable toy options. Each vibrant colour detail is designed to delight and spark curiosity, supporting visual recognition and social learning as your child engages in solo or cooperative play. Not only does this toy train encourage imaginative play, but it’s also a fantastic tool for building early motor skills and hand-eye coordination. Children develop dexterity, grip strength, and the confidence to manipulate objects—all while embarking on their own adventures. The playful theme, inspired by the much-loved railway, brings together learning and fun in a lively, family-friendly way. Being part of the eco wheels series, the train reflects Electoys’ dedication to safety, sustainability, and joyful play. It makes a thoughtful gift for toddlers entering the world of transport toys and for families looking to make responsible choices without sacrificing fun. Welcome this delightful train to your home for memorable play sessions day after day. Safety Warning Keep away from fire
